title: Free radicals biology
script_summary: This script uncovers the fascinating biology of free radicals and their role in our bodies.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about free radicals biology.
Free radicals are unstable molecules that can cause damage in our cells.
But did you know they play a crucial role in processes like aging and disease?
Research shows that our bodies produce antioxidants to counteract these radicals.
Balancing free radicals and antioxidants is key to health, but too many radicals can lead to problems.
Want to dive deeper? Follow for more science insights!
